topics: Basic Concepts
Measures of Central Tendency - Measure of Dispersion - Properties - Random Variables - Discrete and Continuous - Probability Density Function - Binomial Distribution
Poisson and Normal Distributions - Joint Probability Density Function - Marginal and Conditional Distributions - Statistical Inference
Interval Estimation - Mean and Variance - Testing of Hypothesis - Single Population Mean - Difference Between Two Population Means

Multisample Inference - Introduction to Analysis of Variance - One-Way Analysis of Variance (Fixed Effects Model) - Hypothesis Testing in One-Way ANOVA (Fixed Effects Model) - Comparison of Specific Groups in One-Way ANOVA
Regression and Correlation - Fitting of Regression Line (Least Squares Method)

Statistical Inference on Parameters from Regression Line

Rank Correlation Coefficient
